pages.text: Ah, a traveler! This old scroll tells the legend of the Star Crystals — five of them, scattered across Everbright, waiting for someone brave enough to gather them.
Many explorers bring a Guardian Dragon along. Its worry isn't a flaw — it's a job. The trick is learning when to listen and when to keep walking anyway.
When you reach the Sky Festival stage, look back at how far you've come. The crystals shine brightest for the ones who felt nervous and went anyway.
